calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jamell M. Shihadeh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff S&D Rantisi, LLC.
Simone Rantisi, Manager for Plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Dalila Cabrera or Emillio Amaya.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 17, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Emillio Amaya on June 9, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following Exhibits:

Exhibit 1--3 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated May 7, 2009------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2--Declaration of Service of 3 Day Notice
to Pay Rent or Quit dated May 7, 2009-------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff S&D Rantisi, LLC, and against defendants Dalia Cabrera and Emillio Amaya as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $4,400.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,320.00.
Costs - $215.00.
Total - $5,935.00.

Additionally, plaintiff S&D Rantisi, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 20 Persia Avneue, Apt. 4, San Francisco, CA 94112. The Lease is forfeited.

Counsel for plaintiff stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
